features.name: conditional adder or subtractor selection
features.description: Code should include a conditional (ternary) operator selecting between addition and subtraction of the same operands

features.name: adder_subtractor unified circuit
features.description: Code should include an adder-subtractor pattern using bit concatenation and conditional complement for unified addition
features.snippet:
assign sum = {a, sel} + {(sel ? ~b : b), 1'b1};
assign res = sum[W:1];
